mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE notice_id = #{notice_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE(notice_id, admin_id, category, title, content, image_url, is_top, view_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(SEQ_NOTICE.NEXTVAL, #{admin_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{image_url, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{is_top, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET category = #{category}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, image_url = #{image_url}, is_top = #{is_top}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
